scripts.unit: node -e "fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('output',{recursive:true,force:true})" && abap_transpile && echo RUNNING && node output/index.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --esModuleInterop --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target esnext --types node --allowImportingTsExtensions scripts/*.ts .opencode/tools/*.ts
scripts.typecheck:ci: tsc --noEmit --ignoreConfig --esModuleInterop --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target esnext --types node --allowImportingTsExtensions scripts/*.ts
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:ci && npm run unit
